zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey於1527年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親James Lawson Esquire27歲，母親Lady Alison Bertram27歲。他和Frances Conyers至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1607年享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lawson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic ‘son of Lawrence’; see   Law   1. It is also found in Ireland since the 17th century.
Americanized form of Swedish   Larsson   and Danish, Norwegian or North German   Larsen  .

variants.name: Law
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from a Middle English personal name Law(e), a short form of Lawrence .

Scottish and northern English: topographic name for someone who lived near a hill, northern Middle English law (from Old English hlāw, which generally became low in the south and law in the north). Compare Lowe and Lew .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 羅, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Luo   1.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey was born in 1527, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Lawson Esquire, was 27 and his mother, Lady Alison Bertram, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Frances Conyers. He died in 1607, at the age of 80.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey(이)가 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Lawson Esquire(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alison Bertram(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Frances Conyers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1607년 80세의 나이로 사망했다.
